---
title: "Extended Data Table 2: GP AUC by lineage"
author: "Ziang Zhang"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Produced by
[`script/ExtendedDataTable2_GP_AUC_lineage.R`](https://github.com/AgueroZZ/immgenT-GP-analysis/blob/main/script/ExtendedDataTable2_GP_AUC_lineage.R):

```{r edt2-code, code=readLines("../script/ExtendedDataTable2_GP_AUC_lineage.R"), eval=FALSE}
```

## Table {#edt2}

Showing the first 20 rows (of 200); download the full table at
[`figures/generated/ExtendedDataTable2_GP_AUC_lineage.csv`](https://github.com/AgueroZZ/immgenT-GP-analysis/blob/main/figures/generated/ExtendedDataTable2_GP_AUC_lineage.csv).

```{r edt2-preview, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
tab <- read.csv("../figures/generated/ExtendedDataTable2_GP_AUC_lineage.csv", check.names = FALSE)
knitr::kable(head(tab, 20), row.names = FALSE, digits = 3)
```

::: {.figcaption}
**Extended Data Table 2.** One row per GP, one column per major lineage
(annotation_level1). Each value is the one-vs-rest AUC for predicting membership
in that lineage from the GP's loading, computed on healthy non-thymocyte cells.
:::
